en: So did you finish the whole thing, or you have to go somewhere?
ko: 그래서 전체를 다 끝냈나요, 아니면 어디 가야 하나요?

en: I have to go somewhere, but I finished the whole thing, too. Oh, good. You?
ko: 어디 가야 하지만, 전체도 다 끝냈어요. 아, 좋네요. 당신은요?

en: How'd you feel about the grafts?
I struggled with the essay questions.
